component.name: ProgramChannelNode
component.script:
sub init() end sub
sub onProgramSet(event as object) program = event.getData() if program <> invalid m.top.id = program.id m.top.Description = program.description m.top.PlayDuration = program.duration m.top.PlayStart = program.start_timestamp m.top.PlayStop = program.stop_timestamp m.top.Title = program.program_title end if end sub
